On.Terms: AbilMorph.*.Start; MorphFrom ##unitName##@Flying; MorphTo ##unitName##; ScopeContains FlyerHelperSplat; HasStatus FlyerHelper
TimerExpired; TimerName ObserverClickCooldown; IsLocalParticipantType Observer; IsStatus ObserverWhat 1

On.Send: HostSiteOpsSet ::Host {SOpAttachHarness SOpAttachCenter WhiffOffsetDirect SOpMoveUpByDot25 WhiffOffsetRandomMedium SOpForwardLaunchGuideInverted} 1 1
HostSiteOpsSet ::Host {SOpAttachHarness SOpAttachCenter WhiffOffsetDirect SOpMoveUpByDot2 SOpMoveUpByDot2 WhiffOffsetRandomLarge SOpForwardLaunchGuideInverted} 1 1
HostSiteOpsSet ::Host {SOpAttachHarness SOpAttachCenter WhiffOffsetDirect SOpMoveUpByDot5 WhiffOffsetRandomMassive SOpForwardLaunchGuideInverted} 1 1
HostSiteOpsSet ::Host {SOpAttachHarness SOpAttachCenter WhiffOffsetDirect SOpMoveUpByDot25 WhiffOffsetRandomMedium SOpForwardLaunchGuideInverted} 1 1
HostSiteOpsSet ::Host {SOpAttachHarness SOpAttachCenter WhiffOffsetDirect SOpMoveUpByDot2 SOpMoveUpByDot2 WhiffOffsetRandomLarge SOpForwardLaunchGuideInverted} 1 1
HostSiteOpsSet ::Host {SOpAttachHarness SOpAttachCenter WhiffOffsetDirect SOpMoveUpByDot5 WhiffOffsetRandomMassive SOpForwardLaunchGuideInverted} 1 1
HostSiteOpsSet ::Host {SOpAttachHarness SOpAttachCenter WhiffOffsetDirect SOpMoveUpByDot25 WhiffOffsetRandomMedium SOpForwardLaunchGuideInverted} 1 1
HostSiteOpsSet ::Host {SOpAttachHarness SOpAttachCenter WhiffOffsetDirect SOpMoveUpByDot2 SOpMoveUpByDot2 WhiffOffsetRandomLarge SOpForwardLaunchGuideInverted} 1 1
HostSiteOpsSet ::Host {SOpAttachHarness SOpAttachCenter WhiffOffsetDirect SOpMoveUpByDot5 WhiffOffsetRandomMassive SOpForwardLaunchGuideInverted} 1 1

On.Terms: UnitDeathCustomize; KilledByEffect {SiegeTankSCBWSiegedWeapon@DamageAccum SiegeTankSCBWSiegedWeapon@DamageAccum2 SiegeTankSCBWSiegedWeapon@DamageAccum3 SiegeTankSCBWSiegedWeapon@DamageCliff SiegeTankSCBWSiegedWeapon@DamageCliff2 SiegeTankSCBWSiegedWeapon@DamageCliff3 SpiderMineSCBWWeapon@DamageAccum SpiderMineSCBWWeapon@DamageAccum2 SpiderMineSCBWWeapon@DamageAccum3 ScarabSCBWWeapon@Damage ScarabSCBWWeapon@DamageUpgraded}

UnitDeathCustomize; KilledByEffect {ValkyrieSCBWWeapon@DamageAccum ValkyrieSCBWWeapon@DamageAccum2 ValkyrieSCBWWeapon@DamageAccum3 CorsairSCBWWeapon@DamageAccum CorsairSCBWWeapon@DamageAccum2 CorsairSCBWWeapon@DamageAccum3}
